nasb.text: Now there stood by him one of Joab’s young men, and said, “Whoever favors Joab and whoever is for David, let him follow Joab.”

esv.text: And one of Joab’s young men took his stand by Amasa and said, “Whoever favors Joab, and whoever is for David, let him follow Joab.”

cnv.text: 約押的僕從之中，有一個人站在亞瑪撒的屍體旁邊，說：“誰喜歡約押，誰歸順大衛，就當跟隨約押去！”

ccb.text: 约押的一个部下站在亚玛撒的尸体旁边说：“拥护约押和大卫的人来跟随约押吧！”
